## Assignment Summary
- Describe the issue or task this pull request completes.

## Related Issue
- Link the assignment issue, for example: `Closes #<issue-number>`.
- Link exactly one assignment issue in this section.

## Target Assignment Branch
- Name the required submission branch from the linked issue, for example: `assignment/uas-auth-service`.
- Your PR base branch must match the branch named in the linked issue.

## Design Note
- Briefly explain your planned approach before implementation and note any major changes you made while building it.

## Security Impact
- Explain the security problem fixed or the security improvement added.

## Changes Made
- List the main code or configuration updates.

## Validation
- Describe how you verified the change.

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked the related issue
- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I updated any directly related documentation or configuration
